children.text: GTA San Andreas for Minecraft PE 0.13.0

It recreates the most important part of the city, in which the main events of the game. Everything is done very precisely and I think that GTA San Andreas map for Minecraft PE 0.13.0 fans will appreciate. By the way, when you walk on Grove Street, be sure to visit the CJ house.
GTA San Andreas for Minecraft PE
GTA San Andreas map for MCPE allow you to explore the streets of the famous game of Los Santos that have been reproduced as accurately as possible and fully convey the atmosphere of the game GTA.
